description: Offline-first CLI for the Dreaming comprehensible-input language app (Dreaming Spanish / French). Tracks hours, the L1-L7 fluency roadmap, and the leveled video catalog via Dreaming's internal Netlify Functions API.

env_var_specs.name: DREAMING_TOKEN
env_var_specs.description: Bearer token from app.dreaming.com localStorage 'token' or via 'auth login'.

tools.name: day-watched-time_list
tools.description: List per-day on-platform watch time. Optional: date. Returns array of DayWatchedTime.

params.name: date
params.description: Optional single day (YYYY-MM-DD); omit for full series

tools.name: external-time_add
tools.description: Log an external input-time entry. Required: date, timeSeconds. Optional: language (default: es), description, type (default: watching). Returns the new ExternalTime.

tools.name: external-time_delete
tools.description: Delete an external input-time entry by id. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: external-time_list
tools.description: List your external (outside-platform) input-time log entries. Optional: language (default: es). Returns array of ExternalTime.

tools.name: inspect-external-video_inspect_external_video
tools.description: Resolve a YouTube URL into Dreaming's external-video metadata for external-time logging. Required: videoUrl (full YouTube URL). Returns the resolved video object as Dreaming reports it (the spec leaves the shape untyped). Use this before external-time_add to identify a YouTube video you watched outside the platform.

tools.name: playlist_list
tools.description: List your watched-video playlist. Returns array of PlaylistEntry.

tools.name: sign-in_sign_in
tools.description: Exchange email/password for a bearer token. Required: email, password. Returns the new SignInResponse. (public)

tools.name: user_get
tools.description: Get your account stats (hours, daily goal, subscription). Optional: timezone. Returns the User.

params.name: timezone
params.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York) for day boundaries

tools.name: video_get
tools.description: Get a single video's metadata, captions, and stream sources. Required: id. Returns the VideoDetail.

tools.name: videos_list
tools.description: List the video catalog. Optional: language (default: es). Returns array of Video.
